◎译　　名　圣伊利亚斯山
◎片　　名　Mount St. Elias
◎年　　代　2011
◎产　　地　Austria
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语 / 德语

◎主　　演　乔·庄斯顿 Joe Johnston


◎简　　介  

　　At an altitude of 18,000 feet, Alaska's Mount St. Elias is the destination for a trio of mountaineers determined to reach the mountain's summit, and to ski back down as well. Mount St. Elias documents their journey as they trek the fine line between bravery and madness. Written by Palm Springs International Film Festival
